2 The contract plan ID variables must be used together to uniquely identify a plan sponsor's benefit package; prior to the 2013 data release, these variables were required to be encrypted.
3 These two variables (RELATIONSHIP_CODE and RELATIONSHIP_DESC) appear in each data file.
